popularStory.headline: Domhnall II, Earl of Mar (129311 August 1332)
popularStory.description:
Domhnall II, Earl of Mar (129311 August 1332) was briefly Regent of Scotland during the minority of David II, King of Scotland.

Domhnall's father was Gartnait, Earl of Mar. His mother's identity is u …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar於1293年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏薩林時，他的父親Gratney Mac Domhnaill21歲，母親Lady Christina De Brus16歲。他於大約1320年與Isabella Stewart在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年8月11日在英國蘇格蘭培爾斯康享年39歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar于1293年出生在英国苏格兰費伏薩林时，他的父亲Gratney Mac Domhnaill21岁，母亲Lady Christina De Brus16岁。他于大约1320年与Isabella Stewart在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年8月11日在英国苏格兰培爾斯康享年39岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar was born in 1293, in Saline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gratney Mac Domhnaill, was 21 and his mother, Lady Christina De Brus, was 16. He married Isabella Stewart about 1320, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 11 August 1332, in Scone, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar est né en 1293, à Saline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gratney Mac Domhnaill, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Christina De Brus, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Stewart environ 1320, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 août 1332, à Scone, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar 1293 in Saline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gratney Mac Domhnaill 21 und seine Mutter Lady Christina De Brus 16. Er hat um 1320 in Scotland Isabella Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. August 1332 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Scone, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar è nato il nel 1293 nel Saline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gratney Mac Domhnaill, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christina De Brus, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Stewart circa 1320, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 agosto 1332, nel Scone, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Marが1293年にイギリススコットランドフィフサラインで生まれた時，父Gratney Mac Domhnaillは21歳，母Lady Christina De Brusは16歳であった。約1320年にスコットランドでIsabella Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年8月11日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアスコンで39歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar(이)가 1293년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 살라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gratney Mac Domhnaill(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christina De Brus(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 스컷랜드에서 Isabella Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 8월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 스콘에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar nasceu em 1293, em Saline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gratney Mac Domhnaill, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christina De Brus, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Stewart aproximadamente 1320, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1332, em Scone, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar родился в 1293 г. в местности салаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gratney Mac Domhnaill было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Christina De Brus, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Stewart около 1320 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 августа 1332 г. в местности скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar nació en 1293, en Saline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Gratney Mac Domhnaill, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Christina De Brus, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Isabella Stewart aproximadamente 1320, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1332, en Scone, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
